liveUiMonitoring.reason: This verifier reads SourceMap topology only; it does not capture runtime DOM, accessibility tree, or screenshots.

interpretation.projectAnchors: Every bridge tool must appear in governed project source or skill/test/verifier files.

interpretation.sourceMapAnchors: Direct cli.js.map anchors are recorded when the compiled CLI bundle contains the tool name; MCP-only tools remain anchored through bridge/source files.
